tsTroubleshooting.title: 7927 CLE_MAINT_TRAY_LEVEL_SE (07B2) defect auto reset

abstract.p: Warning 7923 [CLE_MAINT_TRAY_LEVEL_SE (07B2) defect] is cleared because the level sensor became active. No further action required.
